Title: Relates to residency requirements for police officers in the village of Medina
Summary: Relates to residency requirements for police officers in the village of Medina in the county of Orleans.
LawCode: Amd §3-300, Vil L; amd §3, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the village law and the public officers law, in relation to residency requirements for police officers in the village of Medina
